    Publications

    You can also find my articles on my Google Scholar profile

    ResGrad: Residual Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Text to Speech

    Published in arxiv, 2023

    Zehua Chen, Yihan Wu, Yichong Leng, Jiawei Chen, Haohe Liu, Xu Tan, Yang Cui, Ke Wang, Lei He, Sheng Zhao, Jiang Bian, Danilo Mandic

    Recommended citation: Zehua, Chen, et al. " ResGrad: Residual Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Text to Speech. https://arxiv.org/abs/2212.14518

    PromptTTS: Controllable Text-to-Speech with Text Descriptions

    Published in ICASSP, 2023

    Zhifang Guo, Yichong Leng, Yihan Wu, Sheng Zhao, Xu Tan

    Recommended citation: Zhifang, Guo, et al. " PromptTTS: Controllable Text-to-Speech with Text Descriptions. ICASSP 2023. https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.12171

    VideoDubber: Machine Translation with Speech-Aware Length Control for Video Dubbing

    Published in AAAI, 2023

    Yihan Wu, Junliang Guo, Xu Tan, Chen Zhang, Bohan Li, Ruihua Song, Lei He, Sheng Zhao, Arul Menezes, Jiang Bian

    Recommended citation: Yihan, Wu, et al. " VideoDubber: Machine Translation with Speech-Aware Length Control for Video Dubbing. AAAI 2023. https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.16934

    Adaspeech 4: Adaptive text to speech in zero-shot scenarios

    Published in INTERSPEECH, 2022

    Yihan Wu, Xu Tan, Bohan Li, Lei He, Sheng Zhao, Ruihua Song, Tao Qin, Tie-Yan Liu

    Recommended citation: Yihan, Wu, et al. "AdaSpeech 4: Adaptive text to speech in zero-shot scenarios. INTERSPEECH 2022. https://arxiv.org/abs/2204.00436

    Self-supervised Context-aware Style Representation for Expressive Speech Synthesis

    Published in INTERSPEECH, 2022

    Yihan Wu, Xi Wang, Shaofei Zhang, Lei He, Ruihua Song, Jian-Yun Nie

    Recommended citation: Yihan, Wu, et al. "Self-supervised Context-aware Style Representation for Expressive Speech Synthesis. INTERSPEECH 2022. https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.12559
